title: SICP 3.5 power-series streams
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch3_stream_power_series.esk covering stream arithmetic for power series, integration/multiplication/inversion where practical, and representative sine/cosine/exp-style checks.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch3_stream_power_series_r and sicp_ch3_stream_power_series_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Covers the algebraic stream-programming part of SICP 3.5.
